# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a Vercel Edge Middleware for Next.js that implements authentication. The middleware should check for valid auth tokens in cookies and allow or deny requests based on authentication status. Handle both authenticated and unauthenticated cases appropriately.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server';

// Public routes that don't require authentication
const PUBLIC_ROUTES = [
  '/login',
  '/register',
  '/forgot-password',
  '/reset-password',
  '/api/auth/login',
  '/api/auth/register',
  '/api/auth/refresh',
  '/_next',
  '/favicon.ico',
  '/public',
];

// Routes that should redirect to dashboard if already authenticated
const AUTH_ROUTES = ['/login', '/register'];

interface TokenPayload {
  sub: string;
  email: string;
  exp: number;
  iat: number;
}

function isPublicRoute(pathname: string): boolean {
  return PUBLIC_ROUTES.some(
    (route) => pathname === route || pathname.startsWith(route + '/')
  );
}

function isAuthRoute(pathname: string): boolean {
  return AUTH_ROUTES.some(
    (route) => pathname === route || pathname.startsWith(route + '/')
  );
}

function decodeJwtPayload(token: string): TokenPayload | null {
  try {
    const parts = token.split('.');
    if (parts.length !== 3) {
      return null;
    }
    const payload = parts[1];
    const decoded = atob(payload.replace(/-/g, '+').replace(/_/g, '/'));
    return JSON.parse(decoded) as TokenPayload;
  } catch {
    return null;
  }
}

function isTokenExpired(payload: TokenPayload): boolean {
  const currentTime = Math.floor(Date.now() / 1000);
  return payload.exp < currentTime;
}

async function verifyToken(token: string): Promise<{
  valid: boolean;
  payload: TokenPayload | null;
  expired: boolean;
}> {
  const payload = decodeJwtPayload(token);

  if (!payload) {
    return { valid: false, payload: null, expired: false };
  }

  if (isTokenExpired(payload)) {
    return { valid: false, payload, expired: true };
  }

  return { valid: true, payload, expired: false };
}

async function attemptTokenRefresh(
  request: NextRequest
): Promise<{ newAccessToken: string | null; newRefreshToken: string | null }> {
  const refreshToken = request.cookies.get('refresh_token')?.value;

  if (!refreshToken) {
    return { newAccessToken: null, newRefreshToken: null };
  }

  try {
    const refreshUrl = new URL('/api/auth/refresh', request.url);
    const response = await fetch(refreshUrl.toString(), {
      method: 'POST',
      headers: {
        'Content-Type': 'application/json',
      },
      body: JSON.stringify({ refreshToken }),
    });

    if (response.ok) {
      const data = await response.json();
      return {
        newAccessToken: data.accessToken || null,
        newRefreshToken: data.refreshToken || null,
      };
    }
  } catch {
    // Refresh failed silently
  }

  return { newAccessToken: null, newRefreshToken: null };
}

function createUnauthorizedResponse(request: NextRequest): NextResponse {
  const { pathname } = request.nextUrl;

  // For API routes, return 401 JSON response
  if (pathname.startsWith('/api/')) {
    return NextResponse.json(
      { error: 'Unauthorized', message: 'Authentication required' },
      { status: 401 }
    );
  }

  // For page routes, redirect to login with return URL
  const loginUrl = new URL('/login', request.url);
  loginUrl.searchParams.set('returnUrl', pathname);
  const response = NextResponse.redirect(loginUrl);

  // Clear invalid cookies
  response.cookies.delete('auth_token');
  response.cookies.delete('refresh_token');

  return response;
}

function setAuthCookies(
  response: NextResponse,
  accessToken: string,
  refreshToken?: string | null
): void {
  response.cookies.set('auth_token', accessToken, {
    httpOnly: true,
    secure: process.env.NODE_ENV === 'production',
    sameSite: 'lax',
    path: '/',
    maxAge: 60 * 15, // 15 minutes
  });

  if (refreshToken) {
    response.cookies.set('refresh_token', refreshToken, {
      httpOnly: true,
      secure: process.env.NODE_ENV === 'production',
      sameSite: 'lax',
      path: '/',
      maxAge: 60 * 60 * 24 * 7, // 7 days
    });
  }
}

export default async function middleware(
  request: NextRequest
): Promise<NextResponse> {
  const { pathname } = request.nextUrl;

  // Allow public routes without authentication
  if (isPublicRoute(pathname)) {
    const authToken = request.cookies.get('auth_token')?.value;

    // If user is authenticated and trying to access auth routes (login/register),
    // redirect them to dashboard
    if (authToken && isAuthRoute(pathname)) {
      const { valid } = await verifyToken(authToken);
      if (valid) {
        return NextResponse.redirect(new URL('/dashboard', request.url));
      }
    }

    return NextResponse.next();
  }

  // Get the auth token from cookies
  const authToken = request.cookies.get('auth_token')?.value;

  // No token present
  if (!authToken) {
    // Try to refresh using refresh token
    const { newAccessToken, newRefreshToken } =
      await attemptTokenRefresh(request);

    if (newAccessToken) {
      const response = NextResponse.next();
      setAuthCookies(response, newAccessToken, newRefreshToken);

      // Add user info header for downstream use
      const payload = decodeJwtPayload(newAccessToken);
      if (payload) {
        response.headers.set('x-user-id', payload.sub);
        response.headers.set('x-user-email', payload.email);
      }

      return response;
    }

    return createUnauthorizedResponse(request);
  }

  // Verify the token
  const { valid, payload, expired } = await verifyToken(authToken);

  if (valid && payload) {
    // Token is valid, proceed with the request
    const response = NextResponse.next();

    // Add user information to request headers for downstream handlers
    response.headers.set('x-user-id', payload.sub);
    response.headers.set('x-user-email', payload.email);

    // Check if token is close to expiry (less than 5 minutes) and proactively refresh
    const currentTime = Math.floor(Date.now() / 1000);
    const timeUntilExpiry = payload.exp - currentTime;

    if (timeUntilExpiry < 300) {
      const { newAccessToken, newRefreshToken } =
        await attemptTokenRefresh(request);

      if (newAccessToken) {
        setAuthCookies(response, newAccessToken, newRefreshToken);
      }
    }

    return response;
  }

  if (expired) {
    // Token is expired, attempt refresh
    const { newAccessToken, newRefreshToken } =
      await attemptTokenRefresh(request);

    if (newAccessToken) {
      const { valid: newValid, payload: newPayload } =
        await verifyToken(newAccessToken);

      if (newValid && newPayload) {
        const response = NextResponse.next();
        setAuthCookies(response, newAccessToken, newRefreshToken);
        response.headers.set('x-user-id', newPayload.sub);
        response.headers.set('x-user-email', newPayload.email);
        return response;
      }
    }

    return createUnauthorizedResponse(request);
  }

  // Token is invalid (malformed, tampered, etc.)
  return createUnauthorizedResponse(request);
}

export const config = {
  matcher: [
    /*
     * Match all request paths except:
     * - _next/static (static files)
     * - _next/image (image optimization files)
     * - favicon.ico (favicon file)
     * - public folder
     */
    '/((?!_next/static|_next/image|favicon.ico|public/).*)',
  ],
};
